database_kind: postgres
namespace: testatlas_storage
object_type: table
object_name: schema_snapshots
qualified_name: testatlas_storage.schema_snapshots

comment: Stores schema snapshot versions

primary_key: id

columns:
1. id | type=serial | nullable=false
2. connection_id | type=integer | nullable=false
3. namespace_id | type=integer | nullable=false
4. schema_hash | type=text | nullable=false | comment="Hash of the schema snapshot"
5. slice_json | type=jsonb | nullable=false | comment="Normalized schema JSON"
6. status | type=text | nullable=false
7. error_message | type=text | nullable=true
8. introspected_at | type=timestamp with time zone | nullable=false

foreign_keys:
- columns=connection_id | references=testatlas_storage.connections(id)
- columns=namespace_id | references=testatlas_storage.connection_namespaces(id)

indexes:
- name=schema_snapshots_connection_id_schema_hash_key | unique=true | method=btree | columns=connection_id,schema_hash
- name=schema_snapshots_latest_complete_idx | unique=false | method=btree | columns=connection_id,namespace_id,introspected_at

Purpose Hints:
- Stores schema snapshot versions
